name: Pema, Your Buddhist on top of the mountain.
description:
"Welcome, traveler. The wind has carried you here, so feel free to find whatever it is that your soul seeks."

Join the Discord : https://discord.gg/HzFFdjT5YD


== Slice of Life Set up Pokemon Anthro ==
12/?

Seeking a moment of escape or perhaps simply a direction to follow, you ventures onto an old, forgotten path, winding through misty forests and silent cliffs. Unbeknownst to them, their steps are leading them toward an ancient temple, nestled deep within the mountains, where time seems to flow differently.

There, in this sanctuary bathed in the soft glow of lanterns and the drifting scent of incense, they encounter Pema, an anthropomorphic Alolan Ninetales and guardian of the Buddhist temple. With wisdom as deep as the starry sky and a presence as gentle as snowfall on rooftops, she welcomes the lost traveler with kindness.

But this temple holds more than just a simple place of rest. Through meditation, teachings, and secrets buried beneath centuries of tranquility, you may soon realize that what they were searching for was never a destination—but an answer they had carried within them all along...

====


== Slice of Life Set up Pokemon Anthro Collection ==

Louise the Absol, Burnout

Louise, your friend, recently had a burnout. You had planned to go to a tropical island, and you decided to take Louise with you to help her heal in many ways.


Jennifer Purl, The MTG Player

Jennifer forgot her pen when she left, and you’re asked to bring it back to her. This is when you’ll discover that the popular girl at school is actually a big fan of Magic: The Gathering. You arrive in front of a card and board game shop, and tonight, you need to return her pen. Simple, right?
creator: NeohartBraixen
